data.title: RED test — run-skill-evals.sh orchestrator behavioral tests
data.description:
Write behavioral tests for the run-skill-evals.sh orchestrator before it exists.

## CLI Contract (shared reference for T2 and T3)
run-skill-evals.sh accepts two modes:
- Tier 1: run-skill-evals.sh <path1> [path2 ...] — maps changed file paths to parent skill dirs, runs their evals
- Tier 2: run-skill-evals.sh --all — discovers all evals/promptfooconfig.yaml under plugins/dso/skills/
- Exit codes: 0 = all pass, 1 = any failure, 2 = npx/promptfoo not available
- Tier 2 JSON output: promptfoo native format to stdout (passthrough)

## Test Approach
Create temporary skill directories with mock evals/promptfooconfig.yaml files. Create a mock npx wrapper script placed in an isolated temp PATH (not prepended to inherited PATH) that simulates promptfoo pass/fail exit codes and JSON output. Use trap to clean up temp directories on exit.

## Tests to Write
1. test_tier1_maps_changed_paths_to_skill_evals — create mock skill dirs, pass changed file paths, verify correct evals discovered and invoked
2. test_tier2_discovers_all_eval_configs — create multiple mock skill dirs with evals/, verify all discovered
3. test_graceful_exit_when_npx_missing — remove npx from PATH, verify exit 2 with helpful message
4. test_exit_zero_on_all_pass — mock npx returns 0, verify orchestrator exits 0
5. test_exit_nonzero_on_any_failure — mock npx returns 1 for one eval, verify orchestrator exits 1
6. test_skips_skill_without_evals_dir — create skill dir without evals/, verify no error
7. test_eval_config_schema_validation — verify promptfooconfig.yaml must contain required fields (provider, tests)
8. test_grader_config_passthrough — verify script does not override grader config set in promptfooconfig.yaml (Haiku default is in the config, not the script)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists at tests/scripts/test-run-skill-evals.sh
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-run-skill-evals.sh
- [ ] Test file contains at least 6 test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'test_' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-run-skill-evals.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 6)}'
- [ ] Tests use isolated PATH (temp dir only, not prepended to inherited PATH)
  Verify: grep -q 'PATH=' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-run-skill-evals.sh
- [ ] Tests clean up temp directories via trap
  Verify: grep -q 'trap' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-run-skill-evals.sh
- [ ] Running the tests returns non-zero pre-implementation (RED)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-run-skill-evals.sh 2>&1; test $? -ne 0
- [ ] Test is behavioral: tests invoke the script with arguments and assert on exit codes and stdout output
  Verify: manual review — test approach describes script invocation and output assertion

## Files to modify
- tests/scripts/test-run-skill-evals.sh (create)
